mechanism: Under the gradual path, sustained DM fiscal expansion keeps oil demand above OPEC+ breakevens, maintaining cartel cohesion. Under the acute path, demand shock pushes oil below breakevens, triggering OPEC+ discord simultaneously with DM financial stress — a correlated shock amplifying the crisis.
regime_dependence: Pro-cyclical: amplifies whichever path is dominant. The interaction is strongest at the transition between paths. Saudi breakeven at $85-96/bbl (2025-26) sets the threshold.
